review_title: wonderful and very useful
description: easy and fast and anyone can create an application from scratch and get a good application that can meet the needs
author: Steven M.
pros: it is easy to create applications by just describing the characteristics that you want to have and the application is created instantly without the need for many hours of work or coding, it is very useful when a quick application is required and it can get you out of trouble. Its functionality is perfect and it simplifies workflows with the quick creation of an application
cons: I don't dislike it at all, it is a good work tool that helps me reduce time in creating applications
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Appy Pie is not all Peaches and Cream.
description: On my first round with Appy pie, they charge me twice for their application. After 3 weeks it was reversed, however, I have to go through several stop payment charges with my banking institution. I was told in an email that the billing process was automated, so they need to get their backend together.
author: Daryl A.
pros: Appy Pie is good for most of the basic applications that's needed today. I have used the free (get started version), as well as a paid version.
cons: As far as a UI/UX design, it fairly straight forward, when it comes to the technical stuff, it was not, and getting assistance was a long drawn out process with their help desk. I ended up coding my functionality in Android Studio using Kotlin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Don't Try if You Have an Older Phone or Want a Unique or Attractive App!
description: Quite frankly, I'm shocked it remains a consideration as a top tier no-code option for app development, given how much better and more sophisticated other options (and vibe coding in general) has grown over Appy Pie's drag and drop interface that is passable only at best on the most up-to-date mobile devices. Do not try to if you have an older phone!
author: Barry F.
pros: Appy Pie gives users the opportunity to build a mobile app without deep coding experience, but that experience leaves a lot to be desired. It was a drag and drop builder pre-vibe coding, a relic now and it should have remained a fossile.
cons: The menus are confusing and poorly executed, and many locked behind paywalls with better features. They talk about their free trial, but actual execution or publication almost isn't possible without becoming a paying customer. Even the paying customer apps, however, have a cookie cutter feeling to them - and that is not a pretty cookie. You've seen these apps before - and once you realize it, you won't unsee them. They are the most basic apps and sites out there. The aesthetic is cheap.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: No-code real estate team app builder.
description: Agents dropped property information and lead forms onto mobile with haste, readily scheduled showings with appointments, and built client-facing apps without coders, enhancing customer experience and project time-to-market benefits.
author: Ignacio S.
pros: Easy-to-use drag-and-drop interface and pre-built templates enable agents to easily develop property listing apps, customize workflows, and add appointment forms without coding; regular updates and support simplify deployment and keep app features up-to-date.
cons: Advanced customizations involve additional learning or pay access, and certain design features or integrations are limited, perhaps avoiding distinctive branding or functionality for premium use cases.

review_title: Fast app builder for storytelling requirements.
description: We designed a sister app for our podcast episodes and behind-the-scenes content. That helped drive up our engagement and allowed to reach an audience that is more mobile than web.
author: Emanuel C.
pros: It allowed me to create an easy-to-build storytelling app without coding. It’s wonderful for featuring our audio and news features in a mobile-first manner.
cons: There is limited design flexibility you are often stuck with stiff templates. Plus, publishing to the app store comes with a couple of hurdles.

review_title: Wish it was better
description: Overall the experience with Appy Pie is mixed I wish they would definitely take more control over the publishing the app since it is $60 a month just to keep your app functional in both Android and Apple and that's during the creation and the testing phase.
author: James H.
pros: I like the concept of making a drag and drop app without using coding and the app process creating it was a little challenging but not too hard and I like the features that you were able to put into your app.
cons: When it was finally time to get the app onto the app store it was a hassle because they test everything there and I had a app in the Google console for 22 days with no testing being done. A lot of the tutorials are dated and are not up to current versions especially when using the messaging part of it and having to use another source other than apple pie.

review_title: Four years later and still excellent customer service
description: Prenominal. Out of the four plus years I've been with this company every Representative that I've spoken with via chat, has excellent customer service, they're very knowledgeable of their product and most importantly they move fast.
author: Juanita A.
pros: Three chats in one day and three different Reps and he was knowledgeable and amazing as well. I am still blown away from the amazing customer service.
cons: Honestly, I don't have any cons. I tried to think of something and I can't.

review_title: Excellent support from [sensitive content hidden]
description: Overall it has been positive, but I am mostly appreciative for the support from the agents, especially [sensitive content hidden], who has helped me republish the app in both Google and Apple.
author: Hilda M.
pros: The ease of designing and support for people with no coding experience and the original price.
cons: I would like more ways to custom design from the edit page, ways to change the layout of the app, etc. It is pretty basic.

review_title: I recommend.

pros: Easy to use. I recommend. Wasy to use and up to date. Team eager to help. Thank you for helping us update our application!
cons: So far everything is ok. Team eager to help. Thank you for helping us update our application BRIT Motor AG!

review_title: Great option to build a good looking App
description: Overall, I'm very happy with my choice to go with Appypie. They offer great value for money, excellent support, and some really good options.
author: John M.
pros: The Platinum package with added support is a great option for anyone with little/no experience wishing to build an app. The additional support when it comes to submission to the app stores is well worth it.
cons: It's minor, but if I had to pick on something I'd say that their online support isn't 24/7, but I've only logged on once or twice an been unable to reach someone. Otherwise they are easy to get hold of and very responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It gives me ease

pros: It has been a very interesting tool where I can create any type of application I need by just specifying the characteristics I want it to have and the artificial intelligence creates it as I asked and very quickly without having to download programs or have programming and coding knowledge, its prices are cheap and I can create the applications I want
cons: I don't like that in order to contact customer service it has to be scheduled with an appointment and you can't have immediate communication at the time I need it

review_title: Appy Pie No Code App Builder
description: Appy Pie is a cool tool for prototyping, image generation and a no code platform.
author: Samuel I.
pros: Easy to use. Simple learning curve. Runs directly on the browser, which means you can build an App on the browser without having to install any software on your computer. Customer support. Has free plans.
cons: Not large community. Might slow down pc when building an App.

review_title: The best product in developing applications, I love it.
description: This product helps me in its ease of use in order to develop applications and improve the work on them well. It is a wonderful thing to work on, really amazing in the results that are obtained.
author: Abdelati L.
pros: With my use of this product, all my developments for the applications that I use in working on it have improved. It is characterized by the multiplicity of functions and tools in my need for service.
cons: A program that helps to develop applications easily using it only.

review_title: Recommend for someone who needs a respectable-looking website/app but has no technical skills.
description: Overall, this software is highly suggested to anyone who wants a website or application but has little to no knowledge with coding and web development. The only tiny drawback is that it is a bit pricey.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For simple programming, it is cost-free and user-friendly, which I appreciate!. Even if you don't know how to program, you can use it to make a straightforward app. I can build an app in only a few minutes. The procedure is made more simpler by Appy Pie, which asks you a series of questions to help you create your app. A link to your own website, an About page, and templates that are simple to adapt to your requirements are just a few of the standard features that come with Appy Pie. I particularly appreciate the text instructions that offer advice on what to include or exclude from the various areas of your app. With only a basic understanding of how to do it, anyone can start creating their own app with Appy Pie.
cons: Appy Pie has limitations when it comes to designing more complicated apps, such as those with dynamic interfaces or in-depth chat features. Similar to gathering user metrics and data, control over the app's backend is lacking. Little control over the user interface and functionality is given to the developer by Appie Pie.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Appy Pie Great NO Code Platform
description: My experience with Appy Pie has been great! The software is incredibly user-friendly and makes it easy to create and deploy an app without any coding experience. The support team is always available to answer any questions I have and they are very knowledgeable. The features offered by Appy Pie are comprehensive and allow for a lot of customisation. I highly recommend Appy Pie for anyone looking to create a mobile app quickly and easily.
author: Lokesh D.
pros: 1. User-friendly Interface: Appy Pie provides an easy to use interface that makes it simple for people of any experience level to create a mobile application in minutes.2. Compatibility Across Operating Systems: Applications created with Appy Pie are compatible with multiple operating systems, giving users greater flexibility when designing their app.3. Affordable Pricing Plans and Free Trial Options : The pricing plans offer affordable options for everyone, while the free trial version allows you to test out the platform before committing financially.. 4. Support Services and Resources Available : Appy Pie offers customer support services as well as resources such as tutorials that teach users how best to utilize their products through videos or user manuals . 5. Increased Efficiency of Businesses : By creating an efficient mobile application businesses can provide more streamlined services which will result in increased sales and higher levels of customer satisfaction overall .
cons: 1. Limited Customization: Appy Pie's application development platform may not offer users the same level of customization as coding and developing applications from scratch. This could limit user experience and prevent their app from standing out in a crowded market.2. Potentially Lengthy Development Timeframe: Developing an app with Appy Pie can take up to several weeks, depending on the complexity of the project, which is much longer than if users coded it themselves or hired a professional developer team for faster results. 3. Expensive Monthly Fees for Professional Plans : To access certain features such as ecommerce integrations and unlimited push notifications, businesses might have to pay expensive monthly fees that are associated with more advanced versions of the software like Pro ($49/mo) or Gold ($99/mo). 4 . Unattractive Templates : As most templates offered by Appy Pie are quite generic-looking they may not be able to attract any potential customers seeking unique designs over typical apps found elsewhere in stores such as Google Play Store & Apple iTunes Store .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: What to build your app without coding
description: I enjoy using the software because of the drag and drop feature. I can build apps very quickly to reach to the digital platforms.
author: Tavaris J.
pros: The number one thing that I love that everything in this software is drag and drop. How easy it is to build your app just by dragging out the features. This is a great software for people that have a dream to build the next great app but do not have no coding background.
cons: Tried to use the software on one of my tablets and I was have a hard time. So I just use the software on my workstation. Would have been nice If it would work on my tablet.

review_title: Try other options first
description: I would not download even if it's free. It needs more options, and I think k you should be able to get it how you want it before you even should have to pay.
author: Holly B.
pros: How you tell it in a sentence or two what you want to create. And the and options once it creates the product.
cons: It didn't create even close yo what I asked it to. None did it have any functions for the app I was trying to create. It may be better if you pay but once you tell it what you want it to create you can't really do anything without paying.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Appy Pie has all you need!
description: Very pleasant experience with satisfying outcome. I would recommend this app to all who want to create apps with no coding required.
author: Margaret Tracy F.
pros: I like it because it is user-friendly and responsive. I like the results of using Appy Pie.
cons: I wish for more levels to build up my skills. I am hoping for an Appy Pie2.

review_title: Remarkable Platform With Excellent Support To Build Beautiful App
description: The software is easy to use and navigate. Very user-friendly, with excellent support from the chat team. We appreciated being able to see our progress and test the app while it was still in the design phase.
author: Sandhya S.
pros: I like their drag-and-drop app-building service, which has many features—lots of options, excellent design, and simple to understand even for those with little experience. The developers are always available to assist me with any request. They are always available to help each and every customer.
cons: So far, I have no complaints and have not encountered any problems that Appypie has not been able to resolve. I'm very pleased with how simple the software is to use.

review_title: APPLE PIE REVIEW
description: Overall experiences was great I totally recommend it

pros: Just the design of the app it doesn't have any bugs it doesn't glitch much or nothing it's just a really good app overall
